positive.prompt: Convert this .NET solution to use NuGet Central Package Management
Our NuGet versions are drifting across projects, help us align them with CPM

negative.prompt: Install a preview version of the .NET SDK
Write an API endpoint in minimal APIs

evals.prompt: Migrate the projects in this solution to use Directory.Packages.props.
evals.expected_output: Directory.Packages.props file is created at the solution root with central package management enabled.
expectations: A Directory.Packages.props file is created at the solution root
Versions are moved from individual .csproj files to Directory.Packages.props
Individual .csproj files use PackageReference without Version attributes
